problem_structure.unknown: what property the iron sorting mechanism actually sorts the crates by
data: dozens of wooden crates with painted numbers and weights
a heavy iron sorting mechanism with three wide angled chutes
a faint chalk line near the base of the mechanism
problem_structure.condition: the crates must be sorted by weight before the mechanism will turn

correct_approach: Kwabena stopped at the entrance and looked at the structure of the room rather than its contents, named aloud what was wanted (the sequence), what was given (numbers and weights), and what bound them (the condition), then identified weight as the relevant property from the chalk line, and the gate closed.
